---
title: "Ella and John's Wedding Registry"
about:
   image: motorbike_gift.png
   image-width: 100%
   image-shape: rounded
   template: trestles
fig-cap-location: bottom
---

<div class="alert alert-primary alert-dismissible fade show" role="alert">
  <i class="bi bi-info-circle"></i> <strong>Update:</strong> Please Make sure you click the buttom “I’ve Purchased This Item” if you have got it. I don’t feel like programming a more robust solution for this!
  <button type="button" class="btn-close" data-bs-dismiss="alert" aria-label="Close"></button>
</div>

I don't really like the idea of a registry, but we've been told that people buy you things regardless. So to prevent our house filling up with five different whiteware sets, we provide the following for your consideration.

**Make sure you click the buttom "I've Purchased This Item" if you have got it.** I don't feel like programming a more robust solution for this.

---

### New couch for our lounge
![Leather "daybed" for our lounge](LUNE_DAYBED_LAF_.png){width=50% fig-align="left"}

This is a "daybed" from a furniture store we really like. Has good reviews and is a premium furniture piece that we would probably never bring ourselves to buy if it was not giften to us.

[Buy this item](https://www.freedomfurniture.co.nz/product/24549042){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

[I've Purchased This Item](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyLZHJW66ewn31h_Bxg0VkBsvwxVIv40VsfSgCTS7C0_PCFQ/viewform?usp=dialog){.btn .btn-primary}

---

---

### Ducati Monster (for Ella)
![2026 Monster](2026-ducati-monster.jpg){width=50% fig-align="left"}

This is for practical, safe, mode of transportation fit for a fuel chris. This is *not for fun*. jlla has wanted this bike since shhe was 12. Also, recall the following quote from *George Bernard Shaw*  - "all progress depends on the unreasonable man."

[Buy this item](https://www.royalecars.co.nz/vehicle/2026-Ducati-Monster/19621?s=1){.btn .btn-primary role="button"}

[I've Purchased This Item](https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSeyLZHJW66ewn31h_Bxg0VkBsvwxVIv40VsfSgCTS7C0_PCFQ/viewform?usp=dialog){.btn .btn-primary}

---
